summary: Round 1 combined test (Stages A+B). Server matrix: all 15+ checks PASS (py_compile, --selftest, GET/POST routes, 400/409/202, Host/Origin 403 guards, traversal probes contained, SIGTERM cleanup). React board: all Playwright scenarios PASS (4 columns, filter, checkboxes, mark-done footer, POST→202, shipping tags+toast, live card move after poll, view link new tab, drag ready→changelog, illegal drag bounce). Stage A spec-read: REV-001 (+ is never a filter) and REV-002 (filter loops) verified in gogo-done + gogo-view SKILL.md. FR8 sweep: plugin.json=0.10.0, 13 commands everywhere stated, no stale TUI refs, dist tracked+stageable, node_modules not staged, 0.8.0 writer byte-identical to 47d872f, charts manifest valid. One new nit (TEST-001): illegal drag while shipping replaces persistent info toast; ships otherwise work correctly and card tag remains. All review findings REV-001..REV-007 verified fixed.
